summary: Iteration 7 - OANDA Forex & Kraken Crypto Integration Testing. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features working correctly. OANDA provides 20 forex pairs with bid/ask/spread/category. Kraken provides 19 crypto pairs with real exchange prices. Charts use OANDA candles for forex and Kraken OHLC for crypto. Signal generation includes trade_logic and trade_reason fields.

backend: GET /api/market/live returns 20 forex pairs from OANDA
Forex pairs have bid, ask, spread fields from OANDA
XAU/USD (Gold) and XAG/USD (Silver) in forex with commodity badge
GBP/JPY, EUR/JPY, AUD/JPY, CAD/JPY in cross pairs
GET /api/market/live returns 19 crypto pairs from Kraken
Crypto has real exchange prices (BTC ~$68K, ETH ~$2K)
Crypto has price, change_24h, volume, high, low fields
GET /api/market/chart/forex/xauusd returns Gold chart from OANDA
frontend: Dashboard shows LIVE indicator with tick counter
Dashboard Forex panel shows bid/ask prices
Dashboard shows Market Hours: Crypto 24/7, Forex Open, NSE Closed
Markets page Forex tab shows 20 pairs
Markets page Forex table has Bid/Ask/Spread/Type columns
Markets page XAU/USD (Gold) shows commodity badge
Markets page XAG/USD (Silver) shows commodity badge
Markets page GBP/JPY shows cross badge
Markets page Crypto tab shows 19 pairs from Kraken
Chart page /chart/forex/eurusd shows OANDA chart with TradingView
Signals page shows Trade Logic section
Signals page shows Signal Trigger section

oanda_integration_verified.forex_pairs: EUR_USD, GBP_USD, USD_JPY, AUD_USD, USD_CHF, USD_CAD, NZD_USD, XAU_USD, XAG_USD, EUR_GBP, EUR_JPY, GBP_JPY, AUD_JPY, CAD_JPY, GBP_CHF, EUR_AUD, EUR_CHF, GBP_AUD, GBP_NZD, AUD_NZD

kraken_integration_verified.crypto_pairs: BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP, DOGE, ADA, AVAX, DOT, LINK, SHIB, LTC, ATOM, UNI, NEAR, APT, FIL, XLM, POL, TRX, INJ

signal_generation_verified.trade_logic: Concise explanation of WHY the trade setup exists
signal_generation_verified.trade_reason: Specific indicator or pattern that triggered the signal
signal_generation_verified.example_trade_logic: The trade setup is based on price rejection from a recent resistance level combined with a potential evening star formation.
signal_generation_verified.example_trade_reason: A minor resistance rejection and evening star formation have signaled possible bearish retracement.

context_for_next_testing_agent: OANDA and Kraken integrations are complete and working. OANDA provides 20 forex pairs with institutional-grade bid/ask/spread data, refreshing every 5 seconds. Kraken provides 19 crypto pairs with real exchange prices, refreshing every 30 seconds. Chart endpoints use OANDA candles for forex and Kraken OHLC for crypto. Signal generation now includes trade_logic and trade_reason fields. Market hours: Forex is OPEN on OANDA practice server (even on Sunday), Indian market CLOSED on weekends.
